title: Expandorama!
description: A Minecraft mod that adds Random Items, Recipes and Tweaks and generally expands the game!
body:
Expandorama! – A Minecraft Mod for Unlimited Possibilities!

Expandorama!, the ultimate Minecraft mod that expands your crafting options and adventures. This mod introduces a vast array of new items, tools, and recipes that enhance your gameplay.
Key Features:

- New Items: Custom tools, Custom Armor
- Custom Recipes: Craft previously unobtainable items with new crafting recipes.

Recomended - [Just Enough Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei)
